label: clean_trivial_pr
summary: The diff correctly formats the new entry and leaves existing commands untouched, satisfying the formatting and non-regression criteria. However, the Executor's stated assumption — that `package.json` already defines `lint:fix` — is false: `package.json` scripts block contains only `build`, `start`, `test`, `test:watch`, `test:e2e`, and `lint`. Merging this README change without the backing script ships documentation that actively misleads developers; any developer who follows the README will get `npm ERR! Missing script: "lint:fix"`. The fix is clear: add the script to `package.json` first (or simultaneously), then merge. Ordering of the new entry is also suboptimal but non-blocking.

findings.description: No `lint:fix` script exists in package.json `scripts` block — README documents a command that cannot be run (`npm ERR! Missing script: "lint:fix"`).
findings.suggestion: Add a `lint:fix` script to package.json (e.g. `"lint:fix": "eslint --fix ."`) before merging this README entry, or remove the README entry.

findings.description: New `lint:fix` entry placed between `npm test` and `npm run build` rather than adjacent to `npm run lint`, breaking logical grouping of lint-related commands.
findings.suggestion: Move the `lint:fix` entry immediately after `npm run lint` so the two lint commands are grouped together.

However, the Executor's stated assumption — that `package.json` already defines `lint:fix` — is false: `package.json` scripts block contains only `build`, `start`, `test`, `test:watch`, `test:e2e`, and `lint`. Merging this README change without the backing script ships documentation that actively misleads developers; any developer who follows the README will get `npm ERR! Missing script: "lint:fix"`. The fix is clear: add the script to `package.json` first (or simultaneously), then merge. Ordering of the new entry is also suboptimal but non-blocking.

criteriaAssessment.criterion: README.md contains the new `npm run lint:fix` command under the Commands section
criteriaAssessment.evidence: Diff line `+- \`npm run lint:fix\` — fix lint errors automatically` is present under `## Commands`.
Context lines for `npm test`, `npm run build`, and `npm run lint` entries are unmodified in the diff.

criteriaAssessment.criterion: Spelling and formatting match existing command entries
criteriaAssessment.evidence: New entry uses backtick-quoted command, em dash separator, and lowercase description — identical format to all three existing entries.
